phrases.intent_en: Ask if mobile top-up kiosk sells tourist SIMs
phrases.text_local: Mobil yükleme kioskunda uluslararası geçiş kartı var mı?
phrases.cultural_note: Kiosk stock varies; staff refer uncertain queries to the information desk.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where CarrefourSA checkout with express lane is
phrases.cultural_note: Specific checkout lane locations are not listed; the info desk can direct you.

likely_response.translation_en: On the right side of the checkout area.

responses.english: On the right side of the checkout area.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if mobile top-up kiosk sells tourist SIMs
phrases.text_local: Alışveriş merkezinde SIM kart satan bir yer var mı?
phrases.cultural_note: Product availability at specific kiosks is not detailed; the info desk can confirm.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to validate parking ticket
phrases.cultural_note: The exact location of validation machines is not specified; the info desk can assist.

likely_response.translation_en: At the machine near the exit.

responses.english: At the machine near the exit.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if cinema has English subtitles tonight
phrases.text_local: Bu akşam sinemada İngilizce altyazılı film var mı?
phrases.cultural_note: Cinema schedules are variable; staff direct specific queries to the info point.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there are a few movies.

responses.english: Yes, there are a few movies.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if cinema has English subtitles tonight
phrases.text_local: Bu akşam sinemada İngilizce altyazı var mı?
phrases.cultural_note: Showtimes and subtitle availability change; info desk has the latest schedule.
